heroSubtitle: Join a team that's innovating industries through sustainable technology
intro: OBH Software is growing, and we're always interested in talking to talented people who share our passion for technology, design thinking and making a real impact.

about.title: Who We Are
about.description: We're a technology consulting firm based at the University of Galway, founded by Stanford Innovation Fellows with a mission to innovate industries through sustainable technology. We combine deep technical expertise with design thinking to build solutions that genuinely transform how businesses operate.

culture.title: Design-Thinking Culture
culture.description: We approach every problem with empathy and creativity. Understanding the user comes before writing code — always.

culture.title: Innovation-Driven
culture.description: We're constantly exploring new technologies and methodologies. If you love learning and experimenting, you'll fit right in.

culture.title: Real Impact
culture.description: Our work directly transforms industries — from digitising fleet management to driving sustainable construction. Every project matters.

culture.title: Collaborative Partnership
culture.description: We work as a team internally and as partners with our clients. No egos, no silos — just great work built together.

roles.title: Types of Roles
roles.description: We typically hire for the following types of positions. Even if we're not actively recruiting, we're always happy to hear from strong candidates.

types.title: Software Developer
types.description: Build custom software platforms and web applications using modern technologies. Experience with React, Node.js, Python or similar technologies required. A passion for clean code and user-centred design is essential.

types.title: UI/UX Designer
types.description: Design intuitive, beautiful interfaces for our platforms and client projects. Experience with Figma, wireframing and user research required. Understanding of design thinking methodology is a strong plus.

types.title: Business Analyst / Consultant
types.description: Work with clients to understand their challenges, map workflows and define software requirements. Strong communication skills, analytical thinking and business acumen required.

types.title: AI / Data Engineer
types.description: Develop AI and machine learning features for our platforms — from predictive maintenance to analytics dashboards. Experience with Python, data pipelines and ML frameworks required.

benefits.title: What We Offer
items: Meaningful work that impacts real industries
Access to Stanford Innovation Fellowship network
Opportunity to grow with a scaling company

cta.title: Interested?
cta.description: We're not always actively hiring, but we're always interested in meeting talented people. Send us your CV and tell us a bit about yourself.
